channel.title: ML-Biomat
channel.description: Tutorials, research notes, and practical guides on ML and multiscale modeling for fiber-based biomaterials. | 纤维生物材料的机器学习与多尺度模拟教程、研究笔记和实战指南。

item.title: SciPy\u66f2\u7ebf\u62df\u5408\u5b8c\u5168\u6307\u5357\uff1a\u4ece\u7ebf\u6027\u56de\u5f52\u5230\u975e\u7ebf\u6027\u5efa\u6a21
Python科研绘图完全指南：从数据到发表级图表
item.description: 材料/生物研究生必备的Matplotlib科研绘图教程：多幅子图、散点图、热力图、统计图表、色彩方案和发表级导出。

item.title: Python科研工具箱完全指南：材料科学与生物研究必备
item.description: 面向材料/生物研究生的完整Python科研工具指南：从NumPy数据处理到Matplotlib发表级作图，含ASE原子模拟和skimage图像分析。

item.title: Understanding Stress-Strain Curves: A Materials Science Primer
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to interpreting stress-strain curves: elastic modulus, yield strength, ultimate strength, toughness, and how these concepts apply to soft biomaterials.

item.title: Silk Fibroin: From Molecular Structure to Mechanical Function
item.description: How silk fibroin's hierarchical structure—from amino acid sequence to beta-sheet crystallites—dictates its remarkable mechanical properties and guides biomaterials design.

item.title: Practical SEM Image Analysis for Biomaterials Research
item.description: How to analyze SEM images of fiber networks with Python: thresholding, fiber measurement, orientation analysis, and batch processing using scikit-image.

item.title: Practical Curve Fitting with SciPy: From Basics to Advanced Models
item.description: A comprehensive guide to curve fitting with SciPy for materials and biology researchers. Linear regression, exponential decay, Hertz indentation, viscoelastic models, with complete code and real examples.

item.title: Scientific Data Visualization with Python: Publication-Ready Figures
item.description: How to create publication-quality figures with Matplotlib and Seaborn: multi-panel layouts, color schemes, high-res export, and common chart types for materials research.

item.title: Setting Up Your Python Environment for Scientific Computing: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Complete guide to setting up a Python environment for materials and biology research: Miniconda, Jupyter, VS Code, package management, and troubleshooting common issues.

item.title: Data Processing with Pandas: From Lab Measurements to Analysis-Ready Data
item.description: A practical guide to using Pandas for materials research data: loading multi-source files, cleaning, group statistics, and visualization.

item.title: NumPy for Materials Research: From Zero to Productive
item.description: Learn NumPy from scratch with real materials science examples: loading experimental data, array operations, statistics, curve fitting, and batch processing.

item.title: A Practical Introduction to Multiscale Modeling for Biomaterials
item.description: A practical overview of multiscale modeling approaches for fiber-based biomaterials: from molecular dynamics to continuum mechanics, with Python code examples.

item.title: Machine Learning for Fiber Mechanics: From Data Preparation to Model Deployment
item.description: Step-by-step guide to predicting fiber biomaterial mechanical properties with ML: data cleaning, feature engineering, model selection, and uncertainty quantification.

item.title: Molecular Dynamics Basics: Your First LAMMPS Simulation
item.description: A hands-on guide to running your first molecular dynamics simulation with LAMMPS: installation, input script structure, force fields, water box simulation, and trajectory analysis.

item.title: Fiber Network Mechanics: Key Concepts for Biomaterials Research
item.description: An introduction to the mechanical behavior of fiber-based biomaterials: network architecture, strain-stiffening, and structure-property relationships.

item.title: Feature Engineering for Materials Science: From Experimental Logs to ML-Ready Data
item.description: How to transform scattered experimental data into structured feature matrices for ML, with Python examples.

item.title: Practical AFM Force Curve Analysis with Python: From Raw Data to Mechanical Properties
item.description: A step-by-step guide to processing AFM force curves in Python: baseline correction, contact point detection, adhesion force, and Young's modulus fitting with Hertz/Sneddon models.

item.title: 应力-应变曲线解读：材料力学入门
item.description: 面向生物/材料研究生的应力-应变曲线入门指南：弹性模量、屈服强度、极限强度、韧性，以及生物材料的特殊性。

item.title: 丝素蛋白：从分子结构到力学功能
item.description: 丝素蛋白的层级结构如何决定其优异的力学性能：从氨基酸序列到beta-折叠结晶，到力学功能。

item.title: SEM图像分析实战：纤维形态的自动化测量
item.description: 用Python自动分析SEM纤维网络图像：阈值分割、纤维直径和取向测量、批量处理，基于scikit-image。
